mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, merchant_id, dish_id, dish_name, dish_image, base_price, unit_price, qty, options_text, options_snapshot, create_time, update_time FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT id, user_id, merchant_id, dish_id, dish_name, dish_image, base_price, unit_price, qty, options_text, options_snapshot, create_time, update_time FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, merchant_id, dish_id, dish_name, dish_image, base_price, unit_price, qty, options_text, options_snapshot) VALUES (#{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{dishId}, #{dishName}, #{dishImage}, #{basePrice}, #{unitPrice}, #{qty}, #{optionsText}, #{optionsSnapshot})
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET qty = #{qty} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
DELETE FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND merchant_id = #{merchantId}
